Patch Set 8:

James, in most places buffer already allocated and usage of kstrndup() is not appropriate. Also I don't think that allocation many little chunks is a good idea. I prefer to allocate big chunk once instead of many small.

This patch failed in lustre-initialization-1 20 times in a row, when other patches are not having similar failure problems.  In the future, please investigate the actual failure messages instead of just the name of the failing test, since resubmitting it for testing so many times will not make it pass.

Patch Set 16: Verified-1 Code-Review-1

This crashed at ZFS mount time with the oops below.  I don't think the oops itself is caused by this patch, but rather that the patch causes the mount to fail and then there is a separate bug in osd_device_fini() that causes the oops.

 BUG: unable to handle kernel NULL pointer dereference at 0000000000000018
 IP: [<ffffffff8129463c>] list_del+0xc/0xa0
 Oops: 0000 [#1] SMP 
 Pid: 3211, comm: mount.lustre Tainted: P
 2.6.32-431.17.1.el6_lustre.g357ff2e.x86_64 #1 Red Hat KVM
 RIP: 0010:[<ffffffff8129463c>]  [<ffffffff8129463c>] list_del+0xc/0xa0
 Process mount.lustre (pid: 3211, threadinfo ffff88007cffe000, task ffff88007a070080)
 Call Trace:
 arc_remove_prune_callback+0x2c/0x70 [zfs]
 osd_device_fini+0x167/0x5b0 [osd_zfs]
 osd_device_alloc+0x2b0/0x3c0 [osd_zfs]
 obd_setup+0x1bf/0x290 [obdclass]
 class_setup+0x208/0x870 [obdclass]
 class_process_config+0xc6c/0x1ad0 [obdclass]
 do_lcfg+0x158/0x440 [obdclass]
 lustre_start_simple+0x94/0x200 [obdclass]
 server_fill_super+0xc6d/0x1620 [obdclass]
 lustre_fill_super+0x1d8/0x530 [obdclass]
 get_sb_nodev+0x5f/0xa0
 lustre_get_sb+0x25/0x30 [obdclass]
 vfs_kern_mount+0x7b/0x1b0
 do_kern_mount+0x52/0x130
 do_mount+0x2fb/0x930
 sys_mount+0x90/0xe0

It looks like this oops would be fixed in osd_device_fini() with:

                if (o->arc_prune_cb != NULL) {
                        arc_remove_prune_callback(o->arc_prune_cb);
                        o->arc_prune_cb = NULL;
                }

but there may be others lurking after this.

Please also fix the checkpatch warnings.
Uploaded patch set 17.

Patch Set 17:

parents.subject: LU-3544 xattr: xattr data may be gone with lock held

commit.subject: LU-4629 libcfs: fix buffer overflow of string buffer
commit.message:
LU-4629 libcfs: fix buffer overflow of string buffer

Buffer overflow of string buffer due to non null terminated string.
Use strlcpy() when it's justifiable.
Use sizeof(var) instead of constants.

Signed-off-by: Dmitry Eremin <dmitry.eremin@intel.com>
Change-Id: Ib8d5493898a292e3c764170d0a0870bee26b23a0
Reviewed-on: http://review.whamcloud.com/9389
Reviewed-by: Andreas Dilger <andreas.dilger@intel.com>
Tested-by: Jenkins
Tested-by: Maloo <hpdd-maloo@intel.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <oleg.drokin@intel.com>
